title: Create Collection List Request
description: Request parameters for creating a new collection list

adcp_major_version.description: The AdCP major version the buyer's payloads conform to. Sellers validate against their supported major_versions and return VERSION_UNSUPPORTED if unsupported. When omitted, the seller assumes its highest supported version.

account.description: Account that will own the list. Pass a natural key (brand, operator, optional sandbox) or a seller-assigned account_id from list_accounts. When omitted, the seller assigns the list to the agent's default account if exactly one is accessible; otherwise returns an error.

base_collections.description: Array of collection sources to evaluate. Each entry is a discriminated union: distribution_ids (platform-independent identifiers), publisher_collections (publisher_domain + collection_ids), or publisher_genres (publisher_domain + genres). If omitted, queries the agent's entire collection database.

filters.description: Dynamic filters to apply when resolving the list

brand.description: Brand reference. When provided, the agent automatically applies appropriate rules based on brand characteristics (industry, target_audience, etc.). Resolved at execution time.

idempotency_key.description: Client-generated unique key for this request. Prevents duplicate collection list creation on retries. MUST be unique per (seller, request) pair to prevent cross-seller correlation. Use a fresh UUID v4 for each request.
